steps: "File dividend tax refund claim with Skat for DKK 153,600 excess withholding on Novo Nordisk dividend (25% withheld vs 15% DK-NO treaty rate)",
"Submit online claim form to Skat documenting 160,000 shares × 9.6 DKK rate with proof of Norwegian tax residency",
"Request Danske Bank Custody provide detailed dividend statement showing gross/net breakdown for claim documentation",
"Follow up with Skat within 90 days if refund not processed, referencing Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement provisions"

references.title: Skat.dk – Claiming Refund of Danish Dividend Tax
Skat.dk – Online Claim Form for Dividend Tax Refund
